name: Sweet-Pickled Cauliflower (Cavolfiore in Agro
recipeIngredient: 1 large cauliflower, trimmed and cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the cauliflower and cut it into florets.
2. Blanch the florets in boiling salted water for 5 minutes. Drain immediately and run cold water over them.
3. Slice the onions and layer with cauliflower florets in sterilized jars.
4. Heat the vinegar, sugar, mustard seed, cinnamon bark, cloves, allspice, and dried red peppers until combined. Pour the hot mixture into the jars, ensuring the florets are completely submerged.
5. Seal the jars while still hot. The pickle will keep in a cool place for up to a year and is ready to eat within a week.
Makes approximately 3 lbs of pickle.
